title: Echani battle armor
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Echani_battle_armor.jpg|thumb|Echani battle armor]]
'''Echani battle armor''' was a strong type of [[Armor/Legends|armor]] that provided solid defense at the cost of some flexibility.

{{Clothes-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''
